candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A pure sample of $N_2O_4(g)$ is placed into a rigid, evacuated, 0.500 L container. The initial pressure of the $N_2O_4(g)$ is 760 atm. The temperature is held constant until the $N_2O_4(g)$ reaches equilibrium with its decomposition products. The figure below shows how the pressure of the system changes while reaching equilibrium. The figure above gives us information about all the following except
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
$N_2O_4(g)$ 按照以下反应方程式分解为 $NO_2(g)$:

$$N_2O_4(g) \rightleftharpoons 2NO_2(g)$$

将纯 $N_2O_4(g)$ 样品置于刚开始被抽空的 0.500 L 刚性容器中,初始压强为 760 atm。在一定温度下,待 $N_2O_4(g)$ 与分解产物达到平衡时,系统压强的变化如下图所示。上述信息无法告知我们以下哪一项:

A. 活化能
B. 反应速率
C. 平衡位置
D. 反应次序
metadata.explanation_zh: 活化能是反应物发生化学反应所需的最小能量。要实验测定活化能,必须在不同温度下测量反应速率。然后利用阿伦尼乌斯方程分析反应速率与温度之间的关系,该方程将反应速率常数与活化能和温度联系起来。然而,给定的问题陈述中没有提及任何温度,因此无法根据所提供的信息计算活化能。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The prompt clearly asks which property cannot be determined from a pressure-vs-time equilibrium graph, and the graph is readable enough to support that task. The expected answer, activation energy, is understandable from the combined text and image. There is a minor inconsistency between the text (atm) and the graph label (torr), but it does not prevent understanding the intended question.
